ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "it_size" INTEGER /* Size code for Italy */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* Size code for France */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Size code for European Union */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Size code for United Kingdom */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* Size code for United States */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Textual description of the size */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size chart is designed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size chart is designed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size entry in size_charts */,
  "under_bust" TEXT /* Under bust measurement range */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement range */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement range */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size entry in size_charts */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer's feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (1-5) given by the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region from which the feedback was submitted */,
  "size_purchased" TEXT /* Size of the product purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the customer details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in size_charts */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock for the given product and size */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product and size */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_id")
)
